positive: A stylized, magical forest clearing scene at twilight. The central focus is a glowing, bioluminescent flora archway framing a majestic deer silhouette. The color palette should be deeply saturated, featuring deep emerald greens, sapphire blues, and vibrant pops of neon violet. The style must be a blend of highly detailed graphic illustration and esoteric folklore art, executed with clean, sharp lines and strong, flat silhouettes against a contrasting gradient background. Composition must be perfectly centered, symmetrical, and immediately readable. Use high-contrast, volumetric rim lighting to emphasize the glowing elements, while deep shadows provide a rich, dramatic mood. Ideal for high-end apparel printing, decorative, vector-inspired details.
negative: blurry, poor quality, low resolution, noise, grain, amateur, watermarks, text, logo, cropped, extra limbs, bad anatomy, deformed, monochrome, cartoonish, messy edges
